overview: Harpy is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 100 HP, 21 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Flying at 140% ratio (294 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 200. Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Flying L, Flying R.

phases.name: Combat
phases.description: 3 attacks. Primary: Flying (140%), Ground Kick (140%), Ground Feather (60%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Flying L, Flying R
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Flying L, Flying R. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1300 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 200, ability check distance 300
strategies.description: Combat area radius 200. Ability check distance 300.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilities: Flying L, Flying R

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1300 units.
